title: dudleya abramsii subsp. calcicola
intro: Dudleya abramsii subsp. calcicola, also known as calcicole liveforever, is a subspecies of the Dudleya abramsii plant, a succulent native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dudleya abramsii subsp. calcicola include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
